referral.heroTitle: You've Been Invited to Ondo RE!
referral.heroSubtitle: Your friend thinks you'd love Ondo RE — the platform that connects property managers, owners, and tenants.
referral.benefitsTitle: What You Get with Ondo RE
referral.managerDesc: Manage properties, tenants, and communications in one place
referral.ownerDesc: Track your portfolio, financials, and maintenance effortlessly
referral.tenantDesc: Pay rent, submit requests, access documents easily
referral.bonusDesc: You were referred using code {{code}} — your friend will earn a free month when you sign up!
referral.trustedDesc: Ondo RE unites property managers, owners, and tenants on a single platform built around trust, transparency, and clear role boundaries — so every participant gets the tools they need.
referral.sweepstakesBannerText: Already an Ondo RE user? Refer friends from your dashboard to earn free months AND get bonus sweepstakes entries! Your referrals boost your chance of winning.
referral.feedbackSectionTitle: Loving Ondo RE? Share it with a colleague!
referral.feedbackSectionDesc: Refer a friend and earn up to 24 free months of portal access — plus bonus entries in our prize sweepstakes.

affiliate.heroSubtitle: Help property professionals discover Ondo RE and earn free platform access plus prize draw entries.
affiliate.step1Desc: Fill out the short application below — it takes less than 2 minutes.
affiliate.step2Desc: We'll review your application and email you your unique referral code within 2 business days.
affiliate.step3Desc: Share your code with your audience. Earn 1 free month for every signup, plus a sweepstakes entry.
affiliate.benefit1Desc: Earn 1 free month of portal access for each referred signup, up to 24 months total.
affiliate.benefit2Desc: Every referral enters you in our sweepstakes for amazing prizes. No cap on entries!
affiliate.benefit3Desc: Introduce property professionals to a platform that genuinely helps them manage their business.
affiliate.whyLabel: Why do you want to be an affiliate? (Optional)
affiliate.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
affiliate.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
affiliate.successDesc: We'll review it and email you within 2 business days.
affiliate.faq1A: Anyone with an audience of property managers, owners, investors, or real estate professionals — whether you have a blog, social media following, podcast, or community.
affiliate.faq2A: There are no cash payments. Instead, you earn free months of Ondo RE platform access (up to 24 months) and bonus sweepstakes entries for every successful referral.
affiliate.faq3Q: When do I get my referral link?
affiliate.faq3A: Once your application is approved, we'll email your unique referral code. You can then share it with your audience and track your referrals from the dashboard.

leadPopup.title: Want a simpler next step?
leadPopup.body: Share your name and email and we'll help make the process simpler and less stressful. We only ask once, and we never sell or share your information.
leadPopup.successBody: We'll follow up soon with a more personalized next step.
leadPopup.submitError: We couldn't save your information just now. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

demo.bannerSubtitle: Watch the walkthrough, use seeded credentials, and step into the live sandbox when you are ready.
demo.heroTitle: See the Manager, Owner, and Tenant experience before you book a call.
demo.heroBody: This page is the public path into the Ondo demo environment. Watch the recorded walkthrough, review the seeded login credentials, and launch the live sandbox when the demo app link is enabled.
demo.heroAvailability: This sandbox uses seeded sample data and resets periodically so you can explore safely.
demo.videoBody: Start here for the quickest overview of the Manager, Owner, and Tenant workflows.
demo.videoFallbackBody: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_VIDEO_EMBED_URL to show the recorded demo walkthrough on this page.
demo.credentialsTitle: Use one of the seeded demo roles
demo.credentialsBody: Each account lands in a different workspace inside the same demo environment.
demo.galleryTitle: Preview the workflows you will show
demo.galleryBody: These preview cards map the screens to feature in the recorded demo and screenshot gallery.
demo.sandboxBody: Use this workspace for exploration only. It contains sample data, may reset without notice, and should never receive private documents or real payment information.
demo.guidedTitle: Want us to tailor the demo to your workflow?
demo.guidedBody: Share a few details below and we will shape the live walkthrough around your portfolio, operations, or tenant experience questions.

form.success: Thanks! We will follow up within 1 business day to confirm your demo.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please email us at

manager.title: Manager / Admin
manager.description: Best for operators who need portfolio-wide visibility, leasing, maintenance, and reporting in one place.
manager.feature1: Monitor properties, leads, and rent collection from one dashboard.
manager.feature2: Review maintenance queues, messages, and owner updates without switching tools.
manager.feature3: Use the assistant to summarize portfolio issues and next actions.
manager.previewBody: Highlight the daily command view for operations, conversations, and financial follow-up.

owner.title: Owner
owner.description: Best for owners who want portfolio visibility, documents, maintenance updates, and financial reporting.
owner.feature1: Review your properties, documents, and occupancy at a glance.
owner.feature2: Track maintenance progress, payment history, and owner-facing reports.
owner.feature3: Use the assistant to answer portfolio questions without waiting on a manual report.
owner.previewBody: Show how owners stay informed without digging through spreadsheets or inbox threads.

tenant.title: Tenant
tenant.description: Best for residents who need payments, documents, maintenance, messages, and self-service support.
tenant.feature1: Pay rent, review balances, and keep receipts in one portal.
tenant.feature2: Submit maintenance requests and follow status updates with less back-and-forth.
tenant.feature3: Open documents, messages, and personal settings from the same login.
tenant.previewBody: Use this view to show how tenants handle common tasks without calling the office.

hero.kicker: Let us help you invest in Utah
hero.title: Why <highlight>Utah</highlight> is one of the nation's best places to invest
hero.body: Utah pairs a steady economy with strong local population growth and 2034 Winter Olympics tailwinds, creating long-term momentum for real estate investors.

loading.title: Loading your application
loading.body: We're verifying the application link and property details.

submitted.title: Application submitted
submitted.body: Your application for {{property}} has been submitted successfully.
submitted.followUp: We'll email you when the property team updates your status.

property.description: Review the rental details before you move into the disclosure and application steps.

messages.invalidLink: This application link is invalid or has expired.
messages.validationFailed: We couldn't verify this application link right now.
messages.createFailed: We couldn't save your personal information yet.
messages.answerRequiredQuestions: Please answer every required question before continuing.
messages.missingApplicationContext: Your disclosure details are missing. Please restart the application from the beginning.
messages.consentRequired: Please acknowledge the criteria and authorize screening before continuing.
messages.submitFailed: We couldn't submit your application right now.

disclosure.title: Criteria & disclosure review
disclosure.body: Please review the owner's acceptance criteria, screening checks, and rental disclosures before moving forward.
disclosure.criteriaAcknowledgementLabel: I reviewed the owner's acceptance criteria and the rental disclosures shown on this page.
disclosure.screeningConsentLabel: I authorize Ondo Real Estate and the property owner to run the disclosed screening checks for this application.
disclosure.futureFeeNotice: If this flow adds an application fee later, the fee disclosure and payment handoff will appear at this checkpoint before any payment is requested.
disclosure.emptyCharges: No fixed non-rent charges were disclosed for this listing.
disclosure.emptyUseBasedCharges: No use-based charge categories were disclosed for this listing.
disclosure.emptyCriteria: No additional owner criteria were listed for this property.

personal.title: Personal information
personal.subtitle: Share the details needed to create your application record before screening begins.

questions.title: Screening questions
questions.subtitle: Answer any custom questions the property owner added for this listing.

review.title: Review your application
review.disclosureConfirmed: You confirmed the owner's criteria and authorized the disclosed screening checks.

affordability.title: Affordability check
affordability.requirement: This property uses a minimum income-to-rent ratio of {{ratio}}x, which is about {{amount}} per year.
affordability.meets: You currently meet the requirement ({{ratio}}x ratio).
affordability.below: You are below the requirement ({{ratio}}x ratio; need {{requiredRatio}}x).

contactForm.title: Get in touch
contactForm.subtitle: Send us a message and we'll get back to you within one business day.
contactForm.successBody: We'll be in touch within one business day.
contactForm.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us at {{phone}}.
